label: Certified Ethical Hacker Complete Course (Exam CEH v13)
description: Certified Ethical Hacker Complete Course (Exam CEH v13) is a comprehensive study-notes course for CEH v13 exam prep, covering the full ethical hacking lifecycle from reconnaissance and scanning to exploitation, post-exploitation, web attacks, cryptography, cloud, and wireless security. It combines clear theory, tool syntax, real-world lab practice, attacker-vs-defender insights, and CEH-style FAQs/Q&A for each topic, with a strong focus on exam blueprint alignment, scenario-based reasoning, reporting, and common trap questions.
